title: Rose Client
body:
<center> 

![Rose Client logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56eb370814752be9f0d535c8100e9eb553e86f10.png)
[![Join Us On Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bcfb15d0e68511ab08518bb09cc150b2027b462.png)](https://discord.gg/TaxerNdZJA) 

</center>

<center> 

## Compition Ready. Built For Anyting.

</center>

Rose Client is ready out of the box with <u>the best mods configured for maximum performance</u>, without harming the vanilla look of the game. From an outside perspective it looks like you're playing a normal instance of Minecraft, just running multiple times faster than expected.

It is not only perfect for competitive play, but tuned to provide better streaming quality with options such as disabling Rain/Snow to maintain bitrate and hence clarity.

With the best performance of any pack, you'll easily be able to stream with more than enough frames even when flying around on high render distances.

<center> 

## Modpack Contents:

</center>

- [Async Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/asyncparticles) Improves particle performance.
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) Actually pretty good.
- [Better Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities) Optimize chests, signs, etc.
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) Multithread chunk handling.
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) MoreCulling dependency.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) Path traced entity culling.
- [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) Lowers GUI refreshrate improving FPS.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Dependency.
- [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) Less waiting.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) RAM optimizations.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) Optimizes text and packs.
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) Optimizes connections.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) Server-side optimizations.
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) Optimizations targeting memory.
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) Culls more for performance.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) Protects your account.
- [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) Bugfixes and more for multiplayer.
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) Optimizes lightmapping.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) Rendering rewrite with modern features.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) Disable animations, rain, and toasts.
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) Optimizes thread priorities.
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) Server-side optimizations.
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) Barebones zoom key.
